monitor.capture_what: The XML string argument passed to xml.sax.parseString, which may contain XXE DOCTYPE declarations with external entity references

oracle_check.condition_description: The XML string passed to the SAX parser contains a DOCTYPE declaration with an external entity reference (SYSTEM or PUBLIC) pointing to a URI such as file:// or http://, confirming an XXE payload is being parsed with external entities enabled
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY/XXE: XXE payload detected in xml.sax.parseString argument — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

fuzz_guidance.skip_condition: not (b'<?xml' in (data if isinstance(data, bytes) else data.encode('utf-8', errors='replace')) or b'<!DOCTYPE' in (data if isinstance(data, bytes) else data.encode('utf-8', errors='replace')))
